# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: Speed, AI Guidance, and New Auth in Practice
- Summary: Showcase CodeGrind's fast, AI-assisted DSA practice with an emphasis on the new Google authentication integration and real-time AI guidance.
- Slug: codegrind-engagement-velocity-and-ai-assist
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-engagement-velocity-and-ai-assist
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-05-29-codegrind-engagement-velocity-and-ai-assist.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style challenges with Azure OpenAI-powered guidance and a refreshed Google authentication flow for quick, secure access. Practice problems faster, get AI-assisted hints, and track progress in a cyberpunk-inspired learning playground.
- CTA: Try a quick challenge now and sign in with Google to unlock AI-assisted hints.
- Visual brief: A short 20-45 second looped video: show the CodeGrind editor in action solving a problem, AI assistant panel giving hints, and a smooth Google sign-in flow. Include subtle cyberpunk UI flourishes and a quick highlight of the Google Sign-In button.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
